CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '1990-01-01 00:00:00.000000'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2038-01-19 03:14:07.999999');
SELECT * FROM test_timestamps WHERE event_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '1990-01-01 00:00:00.000000' AND TIMESTAMP '2038-01-19 03:14:07.999999';
CREATE TABLE detailed_events (event_id INT, event_timestamp TIMESTAMP, description VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO detailed_events VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2021-12-01 10:00:00.123456'), (2, TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00.654321');
SELECT a.id, a.event_time, b.description FROM test_timestamps a JOIN detailed_events b ON a.id = b.event_id WHERE a.event_time > TIMESTAMP '1995-01-01 00:00:00.000000';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM detailed_events WHERE event_timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2022-06-01 00:00:00.000000' AND event_timestamp > TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00.000000';
WITH filtered_events AS (SELECT event_id, event_timestamp FROM detailed_events WHERE event_timestamp IS NOT NULL) SELECT event_id, event_timestamp FROM filtered_events WHERE event_timestamp < NOW();
CREATE TABLE future_events (event_name VARCHAR, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO future_events VALUES ('Event A', TIMESTAMP '2040-01-01 12:00:00.123456'), ('Event B', TIMESTAMP '2050-01-01 15:30:30.654321');

SELECT a.event_name, a.event_time FROM future_events a WHERE a.event_time > TIMESTAMP '2040-01-01 00:00:00.000000' UNION SELECT b.description, b.event_timestamp FROM detailed_events b WHERE b.event_timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2022-01-01 00:00:00.000000';
SELECT event_id, event_timestamp, description FROM detailed_events WHERE description LIKE '%event%' AND event_timestamp = TIMESTAMP '2021-12-01 10:00:00.123456';
